description: Curated OpenAPI description for Namecheap's XML API. The real API uses a single

novel_features.name: XML-to-JSON envelope conversion
novel_features.description: Converts Namecheap XML envelopes into stable JSON so agents can filter, select, and compose responses without XML parsing.

novel_features.name: Namecheap query-auth injector
novel_features.description: Maps clean env vars to Namecheap’s required ApiUser/ApiKey/UserName/ClientIp query parameters and normalizes command-shaped paths to /xml.response.

novel_features.name: Safety-first domain operations
novel_features.description: Supports dry-run previews and explicit destructive MCP annotations for paid and DNS-changing operations.

catalog_description: Manage Namecheap domains, DNS, contacts, pricing, account balances, TLDs, and SSL metadata through a JSON-friendly XML API wrapper.
